source_description: Issue #26 — Knowledge Tree: Lore-Fragments -> passive Boni + Abilities (MVP). Phase 1 of Vertical Slice Epic #32. Today lore-fragment events are one-shot text snippets with no persistence. MVP turns lore fragments into a currency, persists them + invested points, exposes a simple tree screen with 8-10 nodes (passive bonuses only via existing stat hooks: HP cap, XP gain, gold find, crit chance), 1 fragment -> 1 point investment, respec via Mara. Out of scope: ability unlocks, multi-tier branches, story gating.
